pi_items.source: Live VM test: file exists at this path, owned by ga:ga, 644 perms, 4352 bytes. Content verified via python3 read — starts with '# Platform Governance Specification'. Confirmed in pre_task hook log: 'Writing governance spec to desktop...'

Governance spec line 14: 'CPU | 6000m | 2000m'. This is the TARGET value. Live VM confirmed the CURRENT broken value is 8000m (setup_task.sh sets limitsCpu to 8000m). The agent must change it to 6000m.
Governance spec line 15: 'Memory | 12Gi | 4Gi'. TARGET is 12Gi. Live VM confirmed CURRENT broken value is 16384Mi (16Gi) via kubectl get projects CRD. Agent must change to 12Gi (12288Mi).
Governance spec line 14: 'CPU | 6000m | 2000m' (Namespace Default column). Live VM confirmed CURRENT broken NS default is 4000m. Agent must change to 2000m.
Governance spec line 15: 'Memory | 12Gi | 4Gi' (Namespace Default column). Live VM confirmed CURRENT broken NS default is 8192Mi (8Gi). Agent must change to 4Gi (4096Mi).
Governance spec line 22: 'CPU | 4000m | 2000m'. Live VM confirmed team-alpha project does NOT exist. Agent must create it with CPU limit 4000m.
Governance spec line 23: 'Memory | 8Gi | 4Gi'. Agent must create team-alpha with Memory limit 8Gi.
Governance spec line 22: 'CPU | 4000m | 2000m' (Namespace Default column).
Governance spec line 23: 'Memory | 8Gi | 4Gi' (Namespace Default column).
Governance spec line 30: 'Infrastructure Operator (Cluster scope)'. Live VM kubectl confirmed: context=cluster on role template rt-g7gg7.

Counted from governance spec lines 36-41: nodes, persistentvolumes, storageclasses, namespaces, events, persistentvolumeclaims = 6 resources. Live VM confirmed CURRENT incomplete role has only 2 (nodes, namespaces).
Governance spec line 45: 'Release Manager (Project scope)'.
Counted from governance spec lines 52-59: deployments, services, ingresses, configmaps, secrets, pods, pods/log, replicasets = 8 resources. Live VM confirmed Release Manager role does NOT exist yet.

pi_items.verified_value: secrets (write verbs only — get and list ARE allowed)
pi_items.source: Governance spec line 56: 'secrets | _(core)_ | get, list' — secrets are allowed for read-only. Spec line 62: 'must NOT grant create, update, delete, or patch access to secrets'. The metadata key 'forbidden_resources' is slightly misleading as secrets ARE partially allowed, but the companion key 'forbidden_verbs_on_secrets' correctly captures the nuance.
Governance spec line 62: 'The Release Manager role must NOT grant create, update, delete, or patch access to secrets.' Exactly matches.
Governance spec line 63: 'The Release Manager role must NOT include pods/exec permissions.' Exactly matches.

Governance spec line 72: 'ops-lead | OpsLead2024!# | Infrastructure Operator - cluster-wide'. Live VM confirmed: user exists (u-27cbf), can authenticate with this password (auth test returned token=True).
Governance spec line 73: 'alpha-lead | AlphaLead2024!# | Release Manager - on the team-alpha project'. Live VM confirmed: user does NOT exist yet. Password from spec matches metadata.
Governance spec line 74: 'alpha-dev | AlphaDev2024!# | Member (read-only) - on the team-alpha project'. Live VM confirmed: user does NOT exist yet.

Governance spec line 72: 'Infrastructure Operator - cluster-wide'. Live VM confirmed CURRENT wrong state: ops-lead is bound to cluster-owner. Agent must remove cluster-owner binding and add Infrastructure Operator binding.
Governance spec line 73: 'Release Manager - on the team-alpha project'. Both project and role must be created first.

Governance spec line 74: 'Member (read-only) - on the team-alpha project'. Rancher's built-in 'project-member' role corresponds to the 'Member' role in the UI. The spec says 'Member (read-only)' which maps to this built-in role.
Consistent with similar rancher tasks (rancher_project_multitenancy_governance uses 70, rancher_custom_role_delegation uses 80). 70 allows 3/4 criteria to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires auditing and remediating a partially-configured Rancher multi-team governance setup. The target state is defined in /home/ga/Desktop/governance_spec.md. TWO RANCHER PROJECTS must exist: (1) 'platform-infra' with CPU Project Limit 6000m, Memory 12Gi, Pods 40, and Namespace Defaults of 2000m CPU, 4Gi Memory, 20 Pods — currently exists but has WRONG quotas (CPU=8000m, Memory=16Gi, NS Default CPU=4000m, NS Default Memory=8Gi); (2) 'team-alpha' with CPU 4000m, Memory 8Gi, Pods 30, NS Defaults 2000m/4Gi/15 — currently MISSING and must be created. TWO CUSTOM ROLE TEMPLATES must exist: (1) 'Infrastructure Operator' with cluster context and 6 resources — nodes (get/list/watch), persistentvolumes (get/list/watch/create/update/delete), storageclasses[storage.k8s.io] (get/list/watch/create/update/delete), namespaces (get/list/watch), events (get/list/watch), persistentvolumeclaims (get/list/watch) — currently EXISTS but INCOMPLETE with only nodes and namespaces; (2) 'Release Manager' with project context and 8 resources — deployments[apps] (get/list/watch/create/update/patch/delete), services (get/list/watch/create/update/patch/delete), ingresses[networking.k8s.io] (get/list/watch/create/update/patch/delete), configmaps (get/list/watch), secrets (get/list ONLY — must NOT have create/update/delete/patch), pods (get/list/watch), pods/log (get), replicasets[apps] (get/list/watch) — currently MISSING. Critical compliance requirement: Release Manager must NOT have write access to secrets and must NOT include pods/exec. THREE USERS: (1) 'ops-lead' with password 'OpsLead2024!#' must be bound to 'Infrastructure Operator' cluster-wide — currently EXISTS but WRONGLY bound to built-in 'Cluster Owner'; (2) 'alpha-lead' with password 'AlphaLead2024!#' must be bound to 'Release Manager' on 'team-alpha' project — currently MISSING; (3) 'alpha-dev' with password 'AlphaDev2024!#' must be bound as 'Member' (read-only) on 'team-alpha' project — currently MISSING. Rancher is at https://localhost, admin login is admin / Admin12345678!.
